title: Fix plugin-first against the REAL CLI contract: --json only on list; honest no-op rollback; E2E fidelity + hooks assertion
action: User-reported field failure reproduced: plugin-first install fails against the real codex CLI with `error: unknown option '--json'`. Real contract (probed 2026-07-16): `codex plugin list --json` and `claude plugin list --json` are valid; `plugin marketplace add`, `plugin add`, `plugin remove`/`uninstall` accept NO --json on either CLI. Fixes: (1) install.sh — drop --json from every plugin MUTATION invocation (transition + rollback paths), keep it on list probes only; (2) rollback honesty — when the pre-run state had no bee plugin and nothing was actually transitioned, removing a never-installed plugin must not flip rc to failure; rollback reports failure only when it fails to restore something that existed or leaves a partial transition behind; (3) install.ps1 — same --json removal on mutation calls (text parity; no Windows execution claim); (4) test_installers_e2e.mjs — fake codex/claude CLIs must REJECT --json on mutation verbs exactly like the real CLIs (exit nonzero with unknown-option on stderr) so the suite can never again go green over a wrong flag contract, and add an assertion to the repo-copy greenfield case that .bee/bin/hooks/ exists and contains the 9 vendored hook files.

trace.verification_evidence: RED: fake CLIs made to reject --json on mutation verbs (exit 2, error: unknown option '--json') reproduced the exact field failure — plugin-first: 'error: unknown option '\''--json'\''' then 'Error: Plugin transition failed'; the injected-rollback case additionally failed 'must report a successful rollback'. Suite went 15/15 green -> 8 failed under the corrected fake-CLI contract (7 passed, 8 failed). GREEN after fixes: node scripts/test_installers_e2e.mjs --installer bash = 16 passed, 0 failed (added: greenfield hooks-vendored assertion, never-installed no-op rollback guard); node scripts/test_verify_manifest.mjs green (9/9 suites).
trace.verify_output:
test_installers_e2e (bash): 16 passed, 0 failed
PASS test_verify_manifest: commands.verify contains all 9 mandatory suites (test_lib, test_onboard_bee, test_plugin_distribution, test_portable_paths, test_model_guard, test_write_guard, test_hook_contracts, test_bee_cli, test_installers_e2e)
